business.headline: SIPs are rising, but is retail conviction in equities slowing? Here's the answerRecord SIP numbers suggest confidence, yet other signals point to caution. Retail investors are not exiting equities — they are simply investing with greater care and clarity.

New TRACES portal launched: How will it change your TDS filing experience?The Income Tax Department has rolled out a new TRACES portal aimed at improving usability and speeding up processes. But how much difference will it actually make to your TDS filing experience?

Earn Rs 12 lakh or Rs 30 lakh? See how your gratuity changes with 50% basic payIn Part 1, we explained how take-home may fall despite the same CTC. Here, we look at how the 50% rule impacts long-term benefits like gratuity.

Unclaimed assets: How to recover your money from banks, shares, EPF and insuranceUnclaimed money is not lost, but recovering it requires awareness, documentation and persistence, making early action crucial before delays and low returns quietly erode its real value over time.

Markets fall, Adani Power hits all-time high: What's driving the surge?Adani Power's rally highlights how strong demand outlook and defensive positioning can drive select stocks higher, even as broader markets struggle with uncertainty and lack of sustained momentum.

From April to March: Here are all the key FY27 tax deadlines you must trackThe tax calendar may seem long, but staying aware of these dates can make things much simpler. Instead of rushing at the last minute, spreading out your compliance and investments across the year can help you avoid stress and penalties.

Gold down over Rs 1,200, silver slips Rs 6,000: Is this a dip worth buying?Precious metals have slipped noticeably, with gold and silver both under pressure. For investors, this raises a familiar dilemma, i.e., is this the right moment to step in or stay on the sidelines?

Motherson clarifies on Noida workers' protest, says driven by misinformationIn a filing to stock exchanges, the company said recent developments reported in the media relate to labour protests in Noida and some other cities, and are not specific to any one company.

Retail inflation rises to 3.40% in March from 3.21% in FebruaryThe year-on-year inflation rate, based on All India Consumer Price Index (CPI), stood at 3.40% (Provisional) in March 2026. This is slightly higher than February's 3.21%, but still below the 4% mark that is often seen as manageable.

8th Pay Commission meetings: Should govt employees expect a pay revision soon?After months of speculation, the 8th Pay Commission process has picked up pace. With meetings now scheduled, the big question remains, i.e., should government employees expect a pay revision anytime soon?

Sensex ends 700 points lower, Nifty below 23,900; auto stocks hit hardMarkets may have steadied after early losses, but rising oil prices and geopolitical risks continue to cloud sentiment, keeping investors cautious and leaving the near-term outlook uncertain and volatile.

Maruti, Eicher Motors, other auto stocks tumble: What's behind the fall?Maruti Suzuki fell over 4%, while Eicher Motors dropped nearly 5%, making them among the top losers on the Nifty 50. Other auto names also saw weakness, even as the broader market pared some of its early losses.

Ambanis lead Asia's 10 richest families in 2026: Check who else is on the listAt number one is the Ambani family, with a net worth of about $89.7 billion. Their flagship company, Reliance Industries, continues to expand across energy, telecom, retail and financial services.

When employers evade, enforcement looks awaySystemic gaps in enforcement, coupled with deliberate non-compliance, leave workers outside legal protection, raising a larger question: whether labour laws exist merely on paper or are meant to be enforced.

New labour codes explained: How your salary, PF, and gratuity will changeEmployees should ask four key questions: What's my actual wage base? Is PF on capped or full wages? Is this just a salary split change? And am I gaining long-term benefits?

Sensex pares losses by more than 800 points, Nifty recovers from early crashStock market crash: The recovery follows a steep fall at the open, when the Sensex had plunged over 1,600 points and the Nifty slipped below key levels in early trade, reflecting a weak start to the week.

DA hike coming: How much will your monthly pay rise-Rs 360, Rs 540 or more?As the DA hike nears, expectations are building. Even a modest increase can add a steady boost to your salary, but how much can you really expect this time? Let's have a look.

Jyoti CNC shares tumble up to 16%: What's behind the sharp fall?The sharp fall follows reports that French authorities have initiated a judicial probe into the company's subsidiary, Huron Graffenstaden SAS, over alleged violations linked to export control norms.

Stagflation fears are back: How should investors position their money in 2026?During stagflation, money gets re-allocated in the market hence few of the asset classes which usually do not come across as attractive options may become the flavour of the season.

US plans Hormuz blockade: Will India's crude oil and LPG supply be hit?India is already facing pressure on fuel and LPG supplies amid the West Asia conflict. With the US now planning a Hormuz blockade, could the situation worsen?

entertainment.headline: Is Hanumankind collaborating with BTS label HYBE? Here's what we know Indian rapper Hanumankind sparked collaboration buzz after attending BTS' concert in Seoul and interacting with HYBE chairman Bang Si-hyuk. While talks with HYBE Corporation are still at an early stage, a potential collaboration with its newer K-pop groups is being explored.

Not that Lewis: Singer Lewis Capaldi linked to Kim Kardashian at Coachella, reacts Singer Lewis Capaldi had a laugh over a Coachella mix-up after being mistaken for Lewis Hamilton. The confusion began when a fan account incorrectly identified him as Kim Kardashian's date in a viral video.

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai teaser and Varun Dhawan's return to romance. Watch Varun Dhawan returns to his signature romantic-comedy space with Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai. The teaser hints at a lively love triangle set in a vibrant, high-energy world.

Pak pulls up TV channel for Asha Bhosle songs. But Dhurandhar 2 tops its Spotify A tribute to Asha Bhosle triggered regulatory action in Pakistan, with the government citing a ban on Indian content on television. Yet Indian songs continue to trend on streaming platforms like Spotify, exposing a paradox between broadcast restrictions and digital access.

Kendall Jenner and Jacob Elordi: Coachella vibes or something more? Coachella is buzzing with fresh whispers around Kendall Jenner and Jacob Elordi, and the chatter is hard to ignore. The duo was reportedly seen getting cosy at an after-party over the weekend.

Ramayana against Dune 3, The Odyssey? Producer Namit says world wants freshness Namit Malhotra explains why Ramayana stands out in a year packed with global epics like Dune 3 and The Odyssey. The filmmaker believes the story offers something fresh for worldwide audiences.

Vijay might do a film for Jana Nayagan makers to offset losses amid leak, delay Reports suggest that actor Vijay is likely to do one more film with KVN Productions to compensate Jana Nayagan losses caused by piracy and delays. The leak occurred amid Tamil Nadu elections, sparking industry outrage and arrests.

Nicole Kidman on why she's learning to become a death doula Actor Nicole Kidman has revealed she is training as a death doula. She shared how her mother's death shaped the decision, which may seem unusual.

Samay Raina open to collab with Ranveer Allahbadia after 'Kaun Samay' dig Comedian Samay Raina is making a strong comeback with his special Still Alive and is open to collaborating again with Ranveer Allahbadia despite past controversies.

Nobody supported Dhurandhar: Kunal Kohli on 'biggest directors' expecting it to fail Director Kunal Kohli revealed how top filmmakers doubted Dhurandhar: The Revenge and expected it to falter after its opening weekend. The film, however, flipped the narrative with a surprising box office surge.

Asha Bhosle beyond Bollywood: Her gems from the South that are not to be missed Asha Bhosle's contribution to Indian music is immeasurable. The legend, who died on April 12, is best known for her iconic tracks in Bollywood. However, she also delivered unforgettable hits in South Indian cinema.

Dhurandhar 2 box office Day 26: Collections show major drop in 4th week worldwide Dhurandhar 2 sees a noticeable dip as it enters its fourth week at the box office. Despite the slowdown, the Ranveer Singh-starrer continues its record-breaking global run.

Spider-Man: Brand New Day teaser posters put spotlight on Zendaya Amid heightened anticipation for Spider-Man: Brand New Day, the makers have unveiled new teaser posters. Zendaya features prominently in one of the new posters, which was showcased at CinemaCon 2026.

Vijay's Jana Nayagan illegally aired on local cable channel, TV operator arrested Thalapathy Vijay's unreleased film, Jana Nayagan, was illegally telecast on a Coimbatore local channel. After a member of his political party reported the illegal airing, Coimbatore police took swift action.

Dibyendu Bhattacharya on Maamla Legal Hai 2: People praise me like I'm the lead Actor Divyendu Bhattacharya spoke about playing the quietly explosive Kailash Shubhkela and working with Ravi Kishan in Mamla Legal Hai 2, and why the second season of the show is deeper than it looks.

Hailey Bieber posts rare moments of Justin, son Jack from Coachella Hailey Bieber shared a behind-the-scenes look at Justin Bieber's Coachella performance. From sweet shoutouts on stage to rare glimpses of their son Jack, the post captured both the show and their family time.

She lives in us: Zanai shares emotional parting note for grandmother Asha Bhosle Legendary singer Asha Bhosle was cremated in Mumbai with full state honours attended by family, political leaders, and celebrities. Her granddaughter, Zanai Bhosle, expressed heartfelt gratitude for the overwhelming support and love shown during the funeral.

Categorically false: Katy Perry reacts to Ruby Rose's sexual assault allegations A representative of singer Katy Perry has refuted Australian actor Ruby Rose's decade-old assault allegations amid social media uproar. Rose recently detailed the alleged incident, saying it took years for her to speak publicly about the experience.

general news.headline: WhatsApp groups, QR codes, call centre-like ops: How Noida protests were plannedNoida witnessed large-scale, and at times violent, protests over wage hike demands, with police arresting nearly 400 people so far.

However, a hush-hush meeting between the US defence secretary and his Indonesian counterpart has set off fresh speculation. Is Donald Trump now turning his focus toward another vital chokepoint closer to India?

BJP promises Rs 2,000 for women, 3 LPG cylinders in Tamil Nadu manifestoJP Nadda said it was "auspicious" to unveil the manifesto on Tamil New Year and noted that the day also marks the 150th birth anniversary of BR Ambedkar. He said Tamil Nadu represents "the cradle of the world's oldest civilisation" and expressed pride in its cultural legacy, invoking figures such as Thiruvalluvar and Subramania Bharati.

How US is choking Iran through Hormuz blockade and at what costThe blockade is a calculated attempt by President Donald Trump to squeeze Iran's economy at its core by cutting off oil exports, one of its last major sources of revenue and leverage.

Why Trump the Christ has opened a war front against Pope LeoAmid the war on Iran, US President Donald Trump has attacked Pope Leo XIV, calling him "weak on crime" and "terrible for foreign policy". But why is Trump, who faced backlash for projecting himself as Jesus Christ, attacking the Pope, the leader of more than half of the world's Christians?

Live: Fake Rs 20,000 salary-for-all text triggered Noida unrestNoida Labour Protest Live Updates: Fresh protests erupted across Noida's sectors 80, 70, 63 and 121 on Tuesday, as workers demanding higher wages clashed with police, with some protesters also throwing stones at police vehicles. Police intervened to disperse the crowd, chasing away demonstrators and restoring order. Gautam Buddh Nagar Police said 396 people have been arrested and seven FIRs registered in connection with the violent protests. Meanwhile, the Uttar Pradesh government has increased interim minimum wages for unskilled, semi-skilled and skilled workers. Despite this, workers continued their sit-in protest. Follow indiatoday.in for live updates.

Violence in Noida again, workers protesting over wages throw stones, clash with copsBefore the protests turned violent, police were explaining the next hike to workers, who were demanding monthly pay of not less than Rs 20,000. The police said miscreants were trying to take advantage of the situation.

Dhanbad horror: Two brothers, sister's half-burnt body and contradictory claimsA half-burnt woman's body was discovered inside a Jharkhand residence days after her death, with police noting inconsistencies in statements from her two brothers. The case involved delayed handling of the remains and unusual circumstances surrounding the last rites performed inside the house, prompting an ongoing probe.

Live: Class 10 results on April 14? Create DigiLocker accountCBSE Board Class 10 Result 2026 Live Updates: The Central Board of Secondary Education is expected to release the Class 10 results today. This year, about 25,08,319 students appeared for the exam, including 14,08,546 boys and 10,99,773 girls, across 83 subjects and 8,075 centres. Once declared, students can check their results on cbseresults.nic.in, cbse.gov.in, and results.cbse.nic.in using their roll number and date of birth. Marksheets will also be available on DigiLocker and the UMANG App.

US wanted 20-year uranium freeze, Iran offered 5: The story of the almost dealA disagreement over Iran's nuclear programme emerged as the central sticking point in weekend talks between Iran and the United States in Pakistan, with Washington seeking a 20-year freeze on uranium enrichment while Tehran countered with a five-year limit.

Live: Iran says oil sales favourable, vows part of revenue for reconstructionUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: The unfolding crisis in the Strait of Hormuz marks a dangerous escalation in already fragile US-Iran relations, with a sweeping American naval blockade of Iranian ports taking effect at 7:30 IST. President Donald Trump has threated that Iran wants a deal "very badly" and revealing that he was contacted by the "appropriate people" seeking negotiations, even as he warned that any Iranian "fast attack ships" approaching the blockade "will be immediately ELIMINATED". The blockade follows failed weekend talks in Pakistan, where both sides blamed each other for the collapse, with the US citing Iran's refusal to abandon its nuclear ambitions and Tehran accusing Washington of "maximalism, shifting goalposts and blockade", further deepening mistrust. Meanwhile, Iran has rejected the move outright, calling restrictions on maritime movement an illegal act, while its leadership has signalled it will not surrender under threats. On the ground, the situation remains tense, with Iran's armed forces placed on maximum combat alert. The ripple effects are already visible, as oil prices surge past $100 per barrel. France, United Kingdom and European Union called for efforts to restore freedom of navigation in one of the world's most critical trade routes. At the same time, ongoing exchanges of attacks between the Israeli military and Hezbollah in Lebanon have stalled diplomatic efforts. Some US officals inducted that as of now diplomatic channels remain strained but not entirely closed. Follow indiatoday.in for live updates.

Pak link under scanner in Noida violence, 350 arrested; probe suggests conspiracyUP Labour Minister described Monday's workers' protest in Noida a part of a coordinated conspiracy involving "anti-national forces" and said investigators are looking into a possible Pakistan link.

How Aaron, Praful Hinge's plan trapped Sooryavanshi and sparked RR collapse IPL 2026: One clear plan, one early wicket, and the game flipped instantly in SRH's favour. Varun Aaron and Praful Hinge's strategy to dismiss Sooryavanshi set up a collapse RR never recovered from.

Sooryavanshi's India debut loading? 15-year-old in talks for Ireland series IPL 2026: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's IPL rise could soon fast-track him into India colours. With selectors watching closely, the 15-year-old now reportedly stands on the brink of a historic international debut.

IPL Play Of The Day: Hinge swipes left on RR after baiting them into temptations IPL 2026: Praful Hinge decided to swipe right on SRH's request and decided to bait the RR batters into giving away their wickets and ghost them in the end. Hinge finished with four wickets for 34 runs in his spell, helping Hyderabad claim their second win of the season.

SRH vs RR: Riyan Parag explains not using Ravindra Jadeja to bowl at Hyderabad Riyan Parag called the decision to not bowl Ravindra Jadeja a split second call, even as the all rounder impressed with 45 runs off his bat in RR's loss to SRH in IPL 2026.

Debutants Praful Hinge, Sakib Hussain stun RR as SRH's youth gamble hits jackpotSRH's youth gamble pays off as debutants Praful Hinge and Sakib Hussain dismantle RR, with Ishan Kishan's 91 leading a dominant 57 run win in IPL 2026.

Who is Praful Hinge? Nagpur pacer on IPL debut takes 3 wickets in 1st overPraful Hinge struck three wickets in his first IPL over, ripping through RR's top order and giving SRH a dream start in a stunning debut performance.

Replace him with Sooryavanshi for India: Fans slam Abhishek after duck vs RRFans called for Abhishek Sharma to be axed from the Indian T20I setup and replace him with Vaibhav Sooryavanshi in the side. Abhishek was dismissed for a first-ball duck during the match at Uppal.

Will Varun be ready for CSK clash? KKR provides update ahead of Chepauk tieKolkata Knight Riders have provided an update on the fitness of Varun Chakravarthy ahead of their clash against the Chennai Super Kings on Tuesday, April 14. Varun has been out of action for the last two games for KKR.

Ghanaian footballer killed in team bus after armed robbery attackA Ghanian footballer, Dominic Frimpong was shot dead after armed robbers attacked the team bus in Ghana. The incident has raised fresh concerns over player safety during domestic travel.

After reclaiming No.1 spot, Jannik Sinner sets sight on French Open gloryJannik Sinner has set his sights on winning the French Open title after going past Carlos Alcaraz to become the new World No.1 in tennis. Sinner defeated Alcaraz at the Monte Carlo Masters on Sunday to climb to the top spot.

Two Indian sports, cricket, and hockey, will be at 2030 CWG: Sports MinisterSports Minister Mansukh Mandaviya on Monday said the 2030 Commonwealth Games in Ahmedabad are likely to feature two indigenous Indian sports, with cricket and hockey confirmed as part of the programme.

Tim David punished for disobeying umpires' instruction; Hardik Pandya reprimandedTim David was fined 25 per cent of his match fees for ignoring the umpire's instructions in the first innings of the MI vs RCB clash. Meanwhile, Hardik Pandya has also been fined for slow over-rate.

SRH missing Cummins captaincy: Zaheer Khan slams interim skipper Ishan KishanZaheer Khan slammed Ishan Kishan's stint as the interim captain of SRH, claiming that the team is missing the presence of Pat Cummins in the side. Kishan has taken over as the interim captain till Cummins returns.

SRH vs RR Higlights: Hinge, Sakib dismantle Royals as Hyderabad secure 2nd winSunrisers Hyderabad (SRH) vs Rajasthan Royals (RR) Highlights, IPL 2026: Praful Hinge's incredible spell in the powerplay and Sakib Hussain's four wickets ensured that SRH secured their second win of the season. Rajasthan's batting collapsed early on, and Donovan Ferreira and Ravindra Jadeja's stand gave some fight. In the end, it wasn't enough as SRH got over the line and secured the win.

MI sweating over Rohit fitness, Mumbai star set for scans on hamstring issueRohit Sharma is set to undergo scans to determine the extent of the hamstring injury he suffered during MI's loss to RCB at the Wankhede stadium on Sunday, April 12. Guwahati groundstaff rewarded Rs 25 lakh for incredible job in rain-hit gamesThe Guwahati leg of the IPL was completed despite persistent rain threats, thanks to the efforts of the groundstaff. Formula 1 will return to India in 2027: Sports Minister Mansukh MandaviyaIndia is pushing hard for Formula 1's return, but the road back remains complicated. While Mansukh Mandaviya is confident of 2027, the final call still rests with Formula One.
